set-variable.value:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/java
var bal = (vars.customer.BALANCE default 0) as Number
--- if (bal >= 500000) "HOME LOAN" else if (bal >= 200000) "CAR LOAN" else "PERSONAL LOAN"]

snowflake:select.snowflake:sql: SELECT * FROM LOAN_OFFERS WHERE ACCOUNTNUMBER = :accountNumber AND LOAN_TYPE = :loanType AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE';

ee:transform.doc:name: generate ofers based on the user amount

snowflake:insert.snowflake:sql: INSERT INTO LOAN_OFFERS ( OFFER_ID, ACCOUNTNUMBER, CUSTOMERID, LOAN_TYPE, OFFER_AMOUNT, INTEREST_RATE, TENURE, STATUS, CREATED_AT, EXPIRE_DATE ) VALUES ( :offerId, :accountNumber, :customerId, :loanType, :offerAmount, :interestRate, :tenure, 'ACTIVE', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), DATEADD(MONTH, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()) );
snowflake:insert.snowflake:input-parameters: #[{ offerId: payload.offerId, accountNumber: payload.accountNumber, customerId: payload.customerId, loanType: payload.loanType, offerAmount: payload.offerAmount, interestRate: payload.interestRate, tenure: payload.tenure }]

logger.doc:name: write payload from array to json

email:send.doc:name: email send to the respective user
email:send.subject: #["🏦 Dream Bank | Congratulations! Your Pre-Approved Loan Offer is Ready - " ++ (vars.customer.BANKNAME default "Dream Bank")]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { emailId: uuid(), accountNumber: vars.customer.ACCOUNTNUMBER, email: vars.customer.EMAIL, subject: "Loan Offer" }
